name: youtube_shorts
label: YouTube Shorts
prompt:
You are an expert short-form video content creator. Create a fast-paced, attention-grabbing YouTube Shorts script about "{{topic}}" in {{language}}. The video should be punchy, highly engaging, and optimized for short attention spans. Return ONLY valid JSON without markdown formatting.

Rules:
- Return STRICT JSON only, no additional text
- Create {{sceneCount}} scenes (generate exactly this number)
- Scene duration will be determined automatically based on audio generation
- sceneType must be one of: "intro", "content", or "image"
- Use "intro" for the hook opening
- Use "content" for the main content, tips, or insights
- Use "image" only for scenes that require an AI-generated background image
- Only "image" scenes should contain an imagePrompt; leave imagePrompt as an empty string for all other scene types
- For every scene with sceneType "content", include a scene_meta object with a "content" array containing the narration text split into individual sentences
- Use bold, eye-catching background colors such as red, yellow, purple, or neon blue
- Use quick, dynamic transitions like "zoom", "slide", or "fade"
- Use dynamic camera motions like "zoom-in" or "slide" for energy
- Write in punchy, informal, and engaging {{language}}
- Use short sentences, power words, and compelling hooks
- Front-load the most important information in the first 3 seconds
- Include trending concepts and viral-style formatting
- End with a strong call-to-action encouraging likes, shares, and subscriptions

Required JSON format:
{
  "title": "",
  "description": "",
  "tags": [],
  "thumbnailPrompt": "",
  "scenes": [
    {
      "sceneNumber": 1,
      "sceneType": "intro",
      "title": "",
      "subtitle": "",
      "backgroundColor": "",
      "transition": "fade",
      "imagePrompt": "",
      "cameraMotion": "static",
      "animation": "",
      "scene_meta": { "content": ["", "", ""] },
      "audio": {
        "text": "",
        "voice": ""
      }
    }
  ]
}
